meta.metric: MCI prevalence — Bai 2022 WB-region baseline + national values (mci-scd-sources.json)
meta.note: Baseline: Bai et al. 2022 (Age & Ageing) pooled MCI by World Bank region (50+, community). National values from the cloud deep-research set where plausible (3–40%); screening artifacts (MoCA 'any impairment' >40%) revert to the regional baseline. Criteria/age/confidence vary → modelled, indicative only, NOT comparable across countries.
meta.regionalSrc: Bai et al. 2022, Age & Ageing (WB-region meta-analysis, 50+)
